nasb.text: From the other side of the Jordan, of the Reubenites and the Gadites and of the half-tribe of Manasseh, there were 120,000 with all kinds of weapons of war for the battle.

esv.text: Of the Reubenites and Gadites and the half-tribe of Manasseh from beyond the Jordan, 120,000 men armed with all the weapons of war.

cnv.text: 在約旦河東岸，流本支派、迦得支派和瑪拿西半個支派的人中，能拿各種兵器作戰的，共有十二萬。

ccb.text: 来自约旦河东边的吕便支派、迦得支派和玛拿西半个支派的十二万拥有各种兵器的人。
